inputs.label: Annual Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total annual energy usage of the facility. Based on ISO 50001 energy baseline.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity. Varies by region and tariff.

inputs.label: Peak Demand
inputs.businessContext: Maximum power demand in kW. Used for demand charge calculations.

inputs.label: Demand Charge per kW
inputs.businessContext: Monthly demand charge rate from utility.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily operating hours of the facility.

inputs.label: Operating Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of operating days per year.

inputs.label: Expected Energy Savings Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage reduction in energy consumption from proposed measures.

inputs.label: Peak Demand Reduction Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage reduction in peak demand.

inputs.label: Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost for energy saving measures.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost Increase
inputs.businessContext: Additional annual maintenance cost due to new equipment.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typically company's WACC.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the energy saving measures.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for energy costs.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

thresholds.paybackPeriodYears: > 5 -> 'Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider alternative measures.'
thresholds.npv: < 0 -> 'Negative NPV; project may not be financially viable.'
thresholds.irr: < discountRate -> 'IRR below discount rate; project may not meet return expectations.'

formulas.irr: internal rate of return solving NPV=0

hiddenLossDrivers: if paybackPeriodYears > 5 then 'Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider alternative measures.'
if npv < 0 then 'Negative NPV; project may not be financially viable.'
if irr < discountRate then 'IRR below discount rate; project may not meet return expectations.'
suggestedActions: if paybackPeriodYears > 5 then 'Explore additional energy efficiency measures or negotiate lower implementation costs.'
if npv < 0 then 'Re-evaluate project scope or seek incentives/rebates.'
if irr < discountRate then 'Consider alternative investments with higher returns.'
if dataConfidence == 'low' then 'Conduct detailed energy audit to improve data accuracy.'
